p:
{"tool": "make_dashboard", "args": {"name": "Field overview", "description": "Every view the twin can draw, composed over one synthetic field operation.", "body": "# Field operations, every way the twin can draw them

```view
{"view": "metric", "source": "workorders", "agg": "count", "label": "work orders"}
```

```view
{"view": "metric", "source": "workorders", "agg": "sum", "field": "cost", "label": "total cost"}
```

```view
{"view": "metric", "source": "workorders", "agg": "avg", "field": "hours", "label": "avg hours on site"}
```

## Where the work stands

```view
{"view": "kanban", "source": "workorders", "lane": "status"}
```

```view
{"view": "donut", "source": "workorders", "field": "crew"}
```

## When it lands

Orders cluster on day shift; the heatmap shows the hour-by-weekday rhythm, the calendar the season.

```view
{"view": "heatmap", "source": "workorders"}
```

```view
{"view": "calendar", "source": "workorders", "field": "created", "months": 3}
```

## How long it runs

```view
{"view": "gantt", "source": "workorders"}
```

## What it costs, and what shakes

The vibration histogram keeps its spikes; that is the point of it.

```view
{"view": "histogram", "source": "workorders", "field": "vibration"}
```

```view
{"view": "scatter", "source": "workorders", "x": "hours", "y": "cost"}
```

## Where it happens

```view
{"view": "map", "source": "workorders"}
```

## Under the seabed

Three deviated wells. **Drag to orbit.**

```view
{"view": "3d", "source": "wellpaths", "connect": true, "group": "well"}
```

## Read the reports

```view
{"view": "reading", "source": "workorders", "refresh": "open"}
```

The raw rows, for good measure:

```view
{"view": "table", "source": "workorders", "columns": ["title", "status", "crew", "cost"], "limit": 6}
```
"}}

{"tool": "say", "args": {"text": "This is the showcase twin: one synthetic field operation, drawn every way I know how. Open the Field overview dashboard on the board: metrics, a status board, a calendar and heatmap, a gantt of the work spans, distributions, a map, three wells in 3d you can orbit, and the reports as a readable document. Every view is live: stream rows into data/showcase/workorders.jsonl and watch it move. The same view blocks work inside my notes, and each can carry its own refresh policy."}}
